headline: In SpaceX’s IPO, Elon Musk is a risk factor
summary: SpaceX's historic IPO looms, potentially making Elon Musk the first trillionaire. The offering highlights complex financial overlaps between Musk's various companies. Investors face risks due to Musk's interwoven business empire.

headline: SpaceX just filed for what could be the biggest IPO ever
summary: SpaceX has filed its S-1 prospectus, signaling the start of its IPO process. The offering, ticker SPCX on Nasdaq, is anticipated to be the largest ever. SpaceX reported $18.67 billion in revenue in 2025.

headline: ‘Solve all diseases,’ you say?
summary: Optimizer newsletter delivers a special Google I/O edition this week. Victoria Song dissects new tech and health claims from Google I/O. Focus on AI's potential to 'solve all diseases' and impact health.

headline: Here are 42 of our favorite deals from REI’s massive Anniversary Sale
summary: REI's massive annual Anniversary Sale is now live. Find deals on 42 favorite outdoor essentials. Perfect time to stock up for camping and summer adventures.

headline: Here's What Time You Can Play 007 First Light
summary: IO Interactive announces precise launch time for 007 First Light. Players can prepare for next week's highly anticipated release. Get ready to jump into the new 007 game.

headline: The Expanse: Osiris Reborn Is Recasting its Protagonist After Negative Fan Feedback
summary: Owlcat Games will recast the male protagonist in Expanse: Osiris Reborn. Negative fan feedback prompted the decision. The twin brother character will also be recast.

headline: Forza Horizon 6 Players Are Using Exploits to Farm Easy Credits and Unlock Every Car
summary: Forza Horizon 6 players are actively using game exploits. Exploits allow for easy credit farming. Players are unlocking all vehicles quickly and effortlessly.

headline: Who Died (and Who Lived) in The Boys Finale
summary: The Boys series concluded with its dramatic finale, "Blood and Bone." The climactic showdown saw major character casualties. Discover who survived the epic battle between Homelander and Butcher.

headline: Russian jets 'dangerously' intercept RAF spy plane over Black Sea
summary: Russian jets reportedly intercepted an RAF spy plane over the Black Sea. The Ministry of Defence calls the intercepts "dangerous." The unarmed Rivet Joint aircraft was on a routine international flight.

headline: TikTok and YouTube 'not safe enough' for kids, says Ofcom
summary: Ofcom states TikTok and YouTube are 'not safe enough' for children. YouTube claims it collaborates with experts for child-appropriate content. TikTok expresses disappointment, citing its existing safety features.

headline: Why illegal children's homes are being paid up to £2m per child by councils
summary: Councils are reportedly paying up to £2m per child for illegal placements. A ban aimed to end the practice of funding illegal children's homes. Despite the ban, councils continue to fund these placements.

headline: Children in England to be offered free bus trips this August
summary: Children in England will receive free bus trips in August. Chancellor Rachel Reeves unveils a £100m fare-free bus scheme. The initiative aims to alleviate cost-of-living pressures for families.
